name: Alinia
oneliner: Backend compliance controller for high-stake AI agents — embeds real-time auditing, policy enforcement, and risk controls into AI systems at scale. MiFID II focus.
team: Ariadna Font Llitjós (CEO, co-founder), Carlos Muñoz Ferrandis (co-founder). Mouro Capital (Santander) led.
finserv: Santander/Mouro Capital backing. MiFID II compliance focus. Banking-first go-to-market. Working with Santander Group and Origin Financial.
thesis: Alinia fills the Audit & Explainability gap — the first pipeline company dedicated to real-time compliance monitoring and policy enforcement for AI agents in regulated finance. The Santander/Mouro backing validates finserv alignment. European HQ and MiFID II focus make this compliance-native by design. Key uncertainty: whether the product extends to external/third-party agents or primarily serves internal institutional AI — the internal/external boundary is the decisive scoring dimension.
